subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my God! This servant, intoxicated from the brimming cup of Thy love, at the feast of longing with goblet [in hand] [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خدایا پروردگارا این بنده که از جام لبریز محبتت سرمست است و در بزم اشتیاق ساغر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
